user.title: Connect to AAT Multiroom
user.description: Enter the IP address of your AAT amplifier. The default TCP port is 5000; use 1024 (secondary port) if you want the AAT mobile app to keep port 5000. The number of zones is detected automatically from the model.

naming.title: Name your zones and inputs
naming.description: Detected {model} with {zones} zones. Give each zone and input a friendly name. Leave an input blank to hide it. These names are what you'll use with voice assistants ("turn off the kitchen").

data.homekit_compat: HomeKit compatibility (adds Light-as-volume entities and TV media-player class for Apple Home)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure connection
reconfigure.description: Change the IP, TCP port, or the zone count (only needed if the model wasn't auto-detected).

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the AAT at that address. Check the IP, the TCP port, and that the AAT is powered on.

init.title: Edit names and options
init.description: Update the friendly names for zones and inputs, and the HomeKit toggle. Leave an input blank to hide it.
